description_long: This is an adult male figure with a bald head, dressed in a casual, long-sleeve button-up shirt and fitted jeans. The shirt is untucked and has a collar, with the sleeves rolled down to the wrists. The jeans are straight-cut and paired with ankle-high shoes that have a simple, utilitarian design. The figure stands upright with arms slightly extended outward, palms facing down, and feet shoulder-width apart. The facial features are neutral, and the overall build is athletic and proportionate. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a modern, urban style.
description: A bald adult male in a casual button-up shirt and jeans, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The figure wears ankle-high shoes and has a neutral, athletic build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full details of the shirt and jeans, with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the shirt's side seam, and the straight fit of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and jeans, with arms and hands visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, shirt, and jeans, mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt and fitted jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
